prompt: I need to capture a backlog item — our field reps want bulk csv contact upload so they don't waste evenings typing entries in the office one at a time. priority is medium-ish, not urgent.

assertions.description: Summary or decision-log explicitly says zettel-write detected a story shape and delegated to / followed story-write — not improvised a custom format
Output filename matches `us\d{3}\.md` pattern (e.g. us001.md, us002.md)
Body contains `## role` H2 section with a [[pn###|…]] persona link
Body contains `## want` H2 section with the want clause
Body contains `## because` H2 section with motivation
Body contains `## acceptance_criteria` H2 with at least one criterion bullet
Frontmatter has `status: draft` (per akm.md default for new stories)
Skill did NOT also write a parallel generic named-slug card for the same request — must route, not duplicate
